text: 🇰🇼 🇺🇸 Alleged footage shows a suicide drone targeting the Ministries Complex building in Kuwait.
🇮🇷 The published image claimed to be clashes in Dehdasht and near Siyah Mountain is fake and old — Mehr News

⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Bloomberg: The U.S. is deploying the bulk of its most advanced stealth long-range cruise missiles for use in the war against Iran, significantly ramping up its strike capabilities. Officials say the U.S. is repositioning much of its inventory of AGM-158 JASSM-ER missiles, from global stockpiles to bases supporting operations in the Middle East and Europe. Nearly the entire available stockpile could be committed to the campaign, leaving a reduced reserve for other regions and contingencies. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Fars News Agency: A senior Iranian security official said Tehran is moving according to its own planning and target bank, and that a big surprise awaits the U.S. and Israel. The official added that the U.S. target bank is not accurate, while Trump has resorted to media threats after military failures, including the downing of multiple American aircraft. Iran is using asymmetric warfare to wear down the enemy, and the U.S. has already failed in its strategy of a clean, quick and easy attack. @wfwitness

🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 A military source to Tasnim: America is seeking to bomb and kill its pilot in Iran — After failing to rescue the fighter pilot who was shot down by Iranian armed forces two days ago, the Americans are looking to bomb and kill him in locations where they believe he might be present. — He noted: Tonight, several American fighter jets bombed some areas in Kohgiluyeh County of Kohgiluyeh and Boyer-Ahmad Province, as they thought their pilot was in this area. — Regarding whether this individual is currently in the hands of Iranian forces or not, he did not comment and said: We are not commenting on this for now, but one point to mention is that the Americans are not telling the whole truth even about the first pilot, whom they claimed to have rescued. According to this military source, the story of the pilots of this downed fighter jet will turn into another scandal of concealment for the Americans.
